SJHC / Careers

Careers

St. Joseph’s Home Care (SJHC) is looking for talented candidates to join our dedicated staff. We are proud to provide a variety of exciting and rewarding career opportunities servicing clients in Hamilton and surrounding areas. SJHC has a rich history and strong commitment to delivering excellence in client centred, quality care.

We are looking for skilled, committed and motivated individuals to join our team who share our values and vision to consistently deliver a high-quality care experience to our home care clients.

At SJHC, we are proud of the talented, knowledgeable, and dedicated employees who have helped build our tradition of excellence in home care. Our committed team of skilled employees enables us to consistently provide the best possible care to the community we are honoured to serve.

Please explore this section of the site on the left menu bar to learn how you can make a meaningful difference through St. Joseph’s Home Care.
